insight_events.title: Leadership / governance on watch
insight_events.summary: Leadership / governance on watch. 28 executive sales ($11,420,077) in 120d
insight_events.why_it_matters: May change confidence in management alignment, oversight, or execution.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Check transaction context, trading plans, and whether the pattern is unusual for this issuer.

insight_events.title: Insider conviction: exceptional
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May reveal informed capital flows or a change in investor sponsorship.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Review the evidence and decide whether the ticker needs a research note or thesis update.

insight_events.title: Reported earnings
insight_events.why_it_matters: May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Growth regime strengthening
insight_events.summary: Growth regime strengthening: YoY growth moved to +6.0% to +31.3% YoY (baseline median -35.7% YoY) in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

top_claims.claim: Leadership / governance on watch. 28 executive sales ($11,420,077) in 120d
Growth regime strengthening: YoY growth moved to +6.0% to +31.3% YoY (baseline median -35.7% YoY) in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

Snowflake is a consumption-based data platform with strong product revenue growth and improving free cash flow, now explicitly marketed around AI workloads. FY2025 filings show $3.63 billion revenue and $884 million free cash flow; Q1 FY27 accelerated to $1.39 billion revenue (up 33 percent year-over-year). At about $2

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Consumption growth decelerates after the post-earnings re-rating, and the market compresses the multiple on high-growth software.
Competition from Databricks and hyperscaler warehouses.
Stock-based compensation dilutes per-share owner cash.
